title: Chapter 209
content:
A little note before you read ahead. Jack will not lose control again. Ever. This is just to give him a hint about his bloodline.

~~

Chapter 208

[Absorb mana from the nectar of a female’s essence]

[Requirement: 1,000,000 units of mana]

Absorb mana from women’s cum juices. That was the requirement for the second ability to unlock my first bloodline. Whatever it was.

It didn’t require my dick, but my dick could absorb mana nonetheless since it was my body part.

But what it was actually doing was mending my body. The mana from a woman’s orgasm juices was hardening my bones, making them sturdier, like some metal or something.

I absorbed a little from the queen the very first day when I was fucking her and squirted on me in droves with mana in them. And today too, but in between that, I wasn’t able to do anything with her for two days or so.

So, I turned to Valeria, since Elara was also busy. Under the guise of relieving my ability, I fucked her to oblivion, raised her level from a first circle mage to a whopping peak of the second circle. Not much, but too much considering it took only two days.

It wasn’t this fast when I was doing it with my family members. Either it was Valeria who was more talented than them, or my ability had grown.

Well, whatever it was, Valeria’s mana had grown.

But the problem was that, unlike the queen, Valeria’s mana wasn’t automatically infused in her orgasm juices, making it hard for me to progress. Even after teaching her how to, her mana control wasn’t just enough to do it on her own.

That only left the queen as an option.

It wasn’t much of a problem up to this point. Actually, there was no problem.

Not until the seal in her reacted when I put my fingers in her ass. I didn’t feel it then because I thought it was due to my desire to keep it all natural. But even if I were the kind of guy to do that, I was never the type to abuse or hurt a woman.

Not unless she wanted it of her own accord.

So I simply thought I was acting on my own desires. But it was not that. Something was clouding my judgment. From the beginning of this sex session. I didn’t prepare the queen enough to make it easier for her, even if I was going slowly.

I was under the curse’s influence from the start. But it wasn’t my mind, it was acting on. It was my bloodline. The darkness in that bloodline was reacting.

My first bloodline was dark attributed.

Fuck.

Did it have some influence on my thinking? My tendencies? My judgement? My observation? My actions?

Bloodlines were problematic for this sole reason. Either they were righteous, or they were dark. Either way, they influenced one’s mind if one was not aware of it. And just now, I let my guard down. My bloodline let out its dark tendencies by taking power from the necromancer’s curse or seal from the queen, and influenced my actions.

“It doesn’t seem to have worked. But the seal did churn, so maybe it’s that.”

While I was going through a crisis in my mind, Elara checked the seal on her disciple and gave a calm statement, as if it was nothing big to her.

I was about to back off, knowing full well I needed to check this problem and make sure something like this didn’t happen again.

But then thinking again, the damage had already been done. Maybe the queen would be traumatized with anal sex to do it again, so while she was still out of it, I must do it properly this time, making sure she would get used to it.

“Actually, my lady…” I called when Elara was still focused on Elizabeth. “It took me five times to see some effect in Lady Zara. Even if not similar, can we do it a few more times?”

Elara looked at the queen, who had her eyes half closed and panting like she had run a marathon, too far gone to even register what we were discussing.

Elara nodded after a while, “No harm in doing it again.”

Thank goodness.

I pulled back, my dick already a stub, and turned the queen on her stomach, fully laying her down.

I parted her ass cheeks, revealing her hole, which was slightly red but no major injuries, and a little bit of my cum was leaking from it, but most of it was closed. Tight as it was.

Using mana, I relaxed her ass. Fuck the natural fuck. I needed to make sure the queen liked this. If not, I might have to fight a battle to the death right now. Which wouldn’t end in my favor anyway.

After all, escaping from Elara even with the system at my disposal was extremely difficult.

The mana on my fingers immediately relaxed Elizabeth, and I put the fingers inside of her.

It was less tight inside than before, but that was only because mana was properly relaxing her anus.

Putting my tongue there was out of the question for now, so my fingers had to make do.

“Hnnng~~~”

Once she was properly relaxed, I placed my dick at her entrance, making her involuntarily stiffened before I went ahead, using mana to relax her and going past her entrance with relative ease than before, going as deep as half of my dick in prone bone position all at once.

Fuck…

Sure, it wasn’t as tight as before, but was it not tight at all?

Hell no. It was tight enough to make me feel on cloud eight, close enough to the ninth cloud.

“Hnnhh~~~”

Even the queen was enjoying this from her moans, though she was still slightly out of it.

Before she recovered, I began to fuck her properly, in low, slow strokes that only aimed to bring her pleasure.

It wasn’t long before moans of pleasure began to escape the queen, even though I was a little faster than the first time.

Fucking her slowly was fine and all, but nothing beat this fast and deep pounding. Not to mention, when she was enjoying it as well.

She soon came from her ass, a clear sign of her feeling good from it.

Since her cum didn’t fall directly on me this time, I could tell what the common factor for triggering the dark desires of my bloodline was.

The mana that was being used to awaken the second ability of my bloodline. It was stimulating my bloodline. And in turn, that bloodline was affecting me.

That was something I would have to be mindful of. In the future, as well, where mistakes could cost me my life.

“Aanngg~~!!!”

“Kugh!”

The queen came for a second time, screaming into the pillow, but it was a scream of pleasure, and she tightened her asshole so much that even I couldn’t hold back.

I came deep inside of her, without holding back, releasing everything in there.

Still, I didn’t let her recover after that.

Her ass jiggled spectacularly with each thrust, and it was already a little red from the prone-bone position, and red on pale suited quite a bit, making a wonderful view for these sore eyes.

It didn’t take long for me to cum, and the queen came once in this position only, soaking my leg, and I was prepared this time, so I thoroughly checked how my bloodline was being affected. The seal or curse was just the stimulant; the real power source was her mana-infused cum juice.

I next adjusted to a side-lying position where Elizabeth faced me, one leg draped carefully over my hip.

This position allowed for close, intimate contact. I entered her slowly, since she was fully conscious now, and was receiving everything with an open mind.

She hadn’t said anything about the first time. Well, she didn’t say anything at all. She only kept moaning throughout the fuck session. This was the perfect position to kiss her, but kisses are actually useless when you have your dick in your partner’s ass, and that ass is squeezing you so tight you feel like your life is going to leave you.

Yeah. Fuck kissing.

Finally, for the final position, I placed her on her knees, in the traditional doggystyle position, fucking her from behind while her body rocked forward and back, feeling all the thrust with her body as her ass collided with my thighs, making the already red ass even prettier.

~~

Also, let me know in the comments how you guys are liking the novel these days. Be honest, but not brutal. I have a fickle heart.
